items.name: CryptoNet
items.description: Edge-empowered, real-time data processing architecture for scalable, machine-learning-optimized, decentralized data Fabric Framework.

items.name: Heart-Failure-Classification-
items.description: A complete machine learning pipeline for predicting heart failure mortality using clinical records of 299 patients. Built with four classification models, hyperparameter tuning, and three interpretability frameworks.

items.name: Framework-for-CO-Emission-Decomposition-and-Decarbonization-Dynamics-in-ASEAN
items.description: A Hybrid Machine Learning and Panel Econometric Framework for CO₂ Emission Decomposition and Decarbonization Dynamics in ASEAN

items.name: METI-FS
items.description: A computational framework for discovering sparse, reproducible biomarkers from time-series transcriptomics data. METI-FS integrates differential expression, temporal trend analysis, co-expression networks, machine-learning stability selection, and protein-protein interaction evidence into a unified pipeline.

items.name: EpsilonAI
items.description: A machine learning framework built for Java applications.

items.name: predictive-ml-pipeline-life-expectancy
items.description: End-to-end supervised machine learning framework featuring VIF collinearity diagnostics, Lasso/Ridge regularizations, and GridSearchCV optimization.

items.name: PBX-Crypto-Forecasting-Engine
items.description: Machine Learning Framework for Multi-Horizon Cryptocurrency Forecasting and Quantitative Risk Management

items.name: machine-learning
items.description: This repository explores Machine Learning through projects, scripts, and tutorials. It covers data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, and deployment using frameworks like scikit-learn, TensorFlow, and PyTorch, with applications in classification, regression, NLP, and computer vision.

items.name: Autogluon
items.description: AutoGluon is an open-source AutoML framework that automates data preprocessing, model selection, hyperparameter tuning, ensembling and prediction across tabular, multimodal and time-series data, enabling high-performance machine learning with minimal manual configuration.

items.name: Critical-care-predictive-analysis
items.description: Machine learning framework for predicting ICU mortality risk and patient length of stay using clinical and physiological data, with comprehensive EDA, feature engineering, model comparison, and predictive analytics.

items.name: IOT-ML
items.description: This project developed an IoT and machine learning framework for residential energy management. Sensors and an ESP32 microcontroller were used to monitor occupancy, environmental conditions, and power consumption. The system automated appliance control, reduced energy waste, improved efficiency.

items.name: IT-SLA-Predictive-ML-and-Testing
items.description: An end-to-end Machine Learning engine to predict IT ticket resolution times paired with an automated web testing framework for pipeline validation.

items.name: forix
items.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 Predictive Matrix Engine. Leverages machine learning models, real-time football data pipelines, and the LLM framework to process live tournament metrics and generate automated expert match previews.

items.name: pose-based-human-activity-recognition
items.description: A modular Human Activity Recognition framework using 2D pose estimation. Includes skeleton normalization, feature engineering, multi-scale temporal windowing, and subject-independent evaluation with support for traditional machine learning and deep learning models.

items.name: heart-disease-stratification
items.description: A leakage-proof machine learning framework utilizing Scikit-Learn pipelines and tree-based ensembles to predict and stratify coronary artery disease risk with optimized clinical sensitivity.

items.name: DJIA-Smart-Beta-ML
items.description: Machine Learning framework for Smart-Beta allocation on the Dow Jones Industrial Average (2007-2026). Comparison of Ridge, Lasso, XGBoost, and Random Forest models vs DJITR benchmark.

items.name: Heart-Failure-Prediction-Data-Mining
items.description: Benchmarking Machine Learning Framework for Heart Failure Outcome Prediction Using Clinical Data

items.name: Portfolio_ATM_Liquidity
items.description: Machine learning framework using Random Forest to optimize ATM liquidity risk. Projecting a 15%-25% reduction in trapped idle capital while maintaining a 99.9% network uptime benchmark.

items.name: Automated-Detection-of-p-Hacking-via-Machine-Learning
items.description: Automated Detection of p-Hacking and Questionable Research Practices via Machine Learning: A Statistical Forensics Framework

items.name: cas-ratemaking-2026
items.description: Machine learning and credibility framework for market-level rate adequacy benchmarking using IRA Kenya aggregate regulatory data; 2026 CAS Ratemaking Call Paper

items.name: Credit-Risk-Modeling-and-Capital-Allocation-in-P2P-Lending
items.description: P2P lending platforms require effective credit risk assessment to balance default risk against expected returns. Using ~410,000 historical loans from Bondora (2009-2024), this analysis develops a machine learning framework to predict loan defaults and optimize portfolio capital allocation strategies for investors operating under limited capital.

items.name: matbench-discovery_equflashv2
items.description: An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.

items.name: Customer-Segmentation

items.name: DETECTive-Machine-Learning-Based-ATPP
items.description: DETECTive: Automatic Test Pattern Prediction (ATPP) for Digital Circuits is a GNN and LSTM-based framework that predicts test patterns for stuck-at faults in gate-level circuits. By learning circuit topology and fault propagation paths, it enables fast and scalable ATPG without traditional backtracking.

items.name: Online-ML-APP
items.description: An online machine learning application platform using the Streamlit framework

items.name: FAI-Feature-Wise-Adaptive-Imputation
items.description: FAI (Feature-Wise Adaptive Imputation) is a machine learning framework that automatically selects the best imputation method per feature based on statistical properties — optimizing for downstream predictive performance, not just imputation error.

items.name: SwiftMLKit
items.description: A  scikit-learn-inspired machine learning framework for the Swift language

items.name: Electrolyte_Opt-DES
items.description: A physics-guided machine learning framework that treats electrical conductivity as the primary prediction target, with viscosity and density modelled as coupled properties, and then uses the resulting surrogate models inside a multi-objective optimisation workflow to find DES compositions that combine favourable electrolyte characteristics.

items.name: BeanML
items.description: A framework for creating machine learning models.

items.name: Solar_Advisor
items.description: A curated portfolio of AI, Machine Learning, and Automation projects showcasing expertise in deep learning, NLP, web scraping, and data visualization. Includes work on recommendation systems, face embeddings, financial forecasting, and applied AI solutions built with Python, FastAPI, Django, and modern ML frameworks.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: flowMagic
items.description: flowMagic is an R package for automated bivariate gating of flow cytometry (FCM) data. It uses a machine-learning model trained on both experts data and a large, high-quality FCM dataset generated by EVE Online players. The package also provides an extensive visualization toolkit and integrates seamlessly with the flowCore/flowWorkspace frameworks

items.name: CCDR
items.description: OpenCDR is an open-source platform for exploring, interpreting, and extending the Clinical Dementia Rating (CDR) framework through complete state-space analysis, probabilistic interpretation, and continuous monotonic machine-learning models.

items.name: sepsis-sentinel
items.description: SepsisSentinel: An advanced clinical data science and machine learning framework for the early detection and forecasting of sepsis utilizing clinical datasets. Built with scalable data pipelines and predictive modeling.

items.name: Amorphous-Polymer-Electrolyte-Machine-Learning
items.description: Predictive ML framework for modeling ionic conductivity and ion transport properties in amorphous polymer electrolytes. Uses SMILES-derived molecular fingerprints and descriptors as chemically informed features, with model interpretability and feature attribution analyses to surface materials design insights.

items.name: visionai-engine
items.description: VisionAI Engine is an intelligent image processing framework that enables object detection, image classification, and computer vision experimentation using modern machine learning techniques.

items.name: Spatiotemporal-surface-water-dynamics-of-ARB-Ethiopia-using-Sentinel-1-2-and-ML-on-GEE
items.description: An automated GEE-based framework for spatiotemporal surface water mapping (2016–2025) in the Awash River Basin, Ethiopia. Training and validation samples are automatically extracted from JRC-GSWD and Dynamic World datasets .

items.description: Simulation-based climate risk prediction framework using hybrid machine learning models (RF, XGB, GAM, Stack). Includes synthetic data generation, model training, calibration analysis, spatial validation, and sensitivity testing. Fully reproducible with fixed seeds for transparent and scalable benchmarking.

items.name: SkyCast---Weather-Forecast-using-ML
items.description: An Weather Forecasting Web Application that uses Machine Learning to predict weather of next 7 days & built using Django framework. It is intregated with OpenWeatherMap API for fetching real-time current weather. Weather forecast is displayed in user-friendly interface.

items.name: Groundwater-Predictive-Modelling
items.description: Robust hydro-climate data pipeline and machine learning framework. Implements hybrid Gradient Boosting and sequential Kalman Filtering for temporal downscaling, alongside multi-station LSTM neural networks for 3-year forward groundwater forecasting, validated using autocorrelation-corrected Mann-Kendall tests and SGI.

items.name: Meta-Ensemble-Learning-For-Heart-Disease-Prediction-A-Stacking-Based-Approach-With-Explainable-AI
items.description: This project proposes a Meta-Ensemble Learning framework using a Stacking-Based Approach combined with Explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) techniques to improve prediction accuracy and transparency in heart disease diagnosis.In this approach, multiple base machine learning models are trained on heart disease datasets.

items.name: Diversity_Hotspot
items.description: "A Python-based framework that applies unsupervised machine learning (PCA, K-Means) and Mahalanobis Distance to evaluate ecological biodiversity indices and detect environmental anomalies (Degraded zones vs. Bio-hotspots) across 56 compartments

items.name: public-grievance-priortization
items.description: An Explainable AI framework for automated analysis and priority classification of public grievances using NLP and Machine Learning. The system leverages TF-IDF, Random Forest, LIME, and Gemini API to classify grievances into priority levels, provide transparent explanations, and deliver real-time insights through an interactive Streamlit dashboard.
